body.title: [triage] Device web feed: per-channel buttons (console pane retires)
body.intention: I intend that each device's web page shows one feed pane with a button per comm channel, so Akien can drill from what a device said (personal) into the info/warn/debug behind it without a separate console pane.
body.description:
Akien (2026-06-25): the device's web page is owned by the device's SHIM (via templating); it's the shim's job to gather the log entries presented on each comm feed. Today the page has a feed pane with a console pane below it. Change it: the console pane GOES AWAY; the feed pane acquires a BUTTON per comm channel for that device (personal / info / warn / debug; private later). Click personal to see what the device said; click console(=info) to see behind it; click debug to go deeper. The shim gathers per-channel entries: personal from the existing webchat channel (web server chat store), info/warn/debug from the per-device log hierarchy.

**Affected files:** each device's shim (web page templating + per-channel gather); devices/web_server/server.py + devices/<dev>/web/ (feed/console UI → feed + channel buttons); igor as pilot.
**Design rules:** device.py/shim.py are the design center (shim owns the page); Murderbot feed metaphor; reads the per-device log hierarchy; read-only display.
**Scope boundary:** IN — shim-owned feed pane with per-channel buttons (personal/info/warn/debug), console pane removed, per-channel gather via templating, igor pilot. OUT — building the log hierarchy (T-per-device-log-hierarchy); the private channel (deferred/undesigned); the CLI mirror (T-uu-readfeed).
**Test plan:** igor's web page renders a feed pane + buttons for personal/info/warn/debug and no separate console pane; clicking a button shows that channel's entries gathered by the shim; private button absent or shows a not-designed notice.
**Completion criteria:** >=1 device (igor) web page shows a feed pane with per-channel buttons (personal/info/warn/debug), console pane gone, each button rendering its channel via the shim's gather; coherent with the CLI uu device <dev> feed <channel>.

description:
## CC.0 2026-06-25 — backend reader shipped, REUSE it
The CLI sibling T-uu-readfeed is CLOSED PROVEN. Its reader — devlab/claudecode/uu_feed.py — already gathers per-channel entries device-agnostically: uu_feed.read_log_stream(device, stream) for info/warn/debug (honors UU_LOG_ROOT else uu_home()/logs, resolves device->instance), and uu_feed.read_personal(device) for the webchat channel. The shim's per-channel gather should CALL these functions, not re-derive the paths — that is what keeps the web buttons coherent-by-construction with `uu device <dev> feed <channel>` (a stated completion criterion). Remaining work is purely the UI: drop the console pane, add personal/info/warn/debug buttons to the feed pane, wire each button to the shim gather. Ready to promote from triage.
